info.title: OmniReferral API
info.description:
REST API for the OmniReferral real estate referral and lead management platform.

Provides authentication, user management, realtor profiles, GoHighLevel CRM integration,
onboarding webhooks, and administrative functions.

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a Bearer token obtained via the Login or Register endpoints.
Pass the token in the `Authorization` header as `Bearer <token>`.

## Webhooks
GoHighLevel webhook endpoints are public (CSRF exempt) and authenticated via
the `X-OmniReferral-Webhook` header secret.

get.description: Shows current mail configuration, delivery stats, email logs, and auth activity. Admin only.

post.summary: Send test email from admin panel
post.description: Sends a plain text test email to verify mail delivery. Admin only.

post.summary: Test SMTP connection from admin panel
post.description: Tests the TCP connection to the configured SMTP server. Admin only.

get.description: Shows connection status, KPI stats, recent webhooks/onboarding activity, and configured form URLs.
Shows API credentials, form URLs, and hidden field configuration.

put.description: Updates API credentials, form URLs, and hidden field mapping. Super admin only.

get.summary: View GHL webhook and onboarding logs
get.description: Filterable logs showing all GoHighLevel webhook deliveries and onboarding submissions. Includes retry and resend actions.
Shows a dashboard for testing GHL webhooks, connection, and sync functionality.

post.description: Tests the configured GoHighLevel API key and location ID by pinging the GHL API. Updates last tested timestamp.
Sends a simulated webhook payload to the local onboarding or purchase webhook endpoint for testing.
Attempts to sync a specific user to GoHighLevel as a contact and returns the result.
Re-fires an unprocessed webhook event payload against the local webhook endpoint for reprocessing.
Re-sends the portal access setup email to the user associated with a given onboarding log entry.

get.description: Shows current effective mail configuration (DB + .env fallback). Admin access required.

put.description: Updates SMTP/mail driver credentials. Super admin only. Password is stored encrypted.

post.description: Attempts to connect to the configured SMTP server. Returns success or error message.
Sends a raw test email to verify mail delivery is working end-to-end.
Logs in a user with workspace role, email, and password. Starts a web session.
Sends a password reset email to the given address.

302.description: Redirect with success or error message

post.description: Consumes a password reset token and sets a new password.

get.description: Displays the one-time password setup form for a valid token.

302.description: Redirect to forgot-password if token invalid/expired

post.description: Consumes a one-time setup token, sets the user's password, and logs them in.

post.summary: Handle package purchase webhook from GoHighLevel
post.description: Receives a package purchase notification from GHL, creates/updates the user and realtor profile, dispatches sync and setup email.
Handles onboarding form submission webhook. Creates/updates user, realtor/buyer profile, generates password token, and queues setup email.

post.summary: Receive lead status update from GoHighLevel
post.description: Updates lead status (contacted, closed, etc.) and notifies the customer if needed.

bearerAuth.description: Enter Sanctum token in format: Bearer <token>

tags.description: GoHighLevel CRM integration - webhooks, contact sync, lead sync, event tracking

tags.name: Webhooks
